title: JMS Group is founded
description: Established in Gurugram with a single conviction: publish one price sheet, and hold to it.

title: First commercial delivery
description: Our first high-street retail address is handed over, setting the template for the commercial portfolio.

title: Expansion into plotted development
description: Clear-title, fully serviced plots launch on the Sohna and New Gurugram growth corridors.

title: 1,000 customers and investors
description: The portfolio crosses a thousand families and investors, with a team of more than a hundred behind it.

title: Fourteen landmark addresses
description: Residential, commercial, plotted, senior living and luxury developments across Gurugram and the NCR.
